title: Festuca macrathera
intro: Festuca rubra subsp. rubra, also known as red fescue, is a perennial grass species belonging to the Poaceae family. The health benefits of Festuca rubra include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms associated with arthritis and other inflammatory conditions. The bioactive constituents of Festuca rubra include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Festuca rubra is commonly used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to support joint health and reduce inflammation.
